overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The character navigates from covered market streets through narrow alleys, up to rooftop walkways, and back down to busy commercial areas with neon signage and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market entrance transitioning to open commercial street

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit street with passing traffic
futuristic white car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along sidewalk past shop fronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sedan driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: overhead concrete covering with metal support beams
large illuminated advertising screens with Asian characters and product displays
sleek white vehicle with red taillights and aerodynamic design
red and black automated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a partially covered market area with concrete architecture, then transitions to an open sunlit street lined with neon billboards. A futuristic white car passes by on the road as the character walks along the sidewalk, passing vending machines and shop fronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with steep concrete staircase

events.description: turns right into narrow alleyway with red walls and graffiti
begins ascending steep concrete stairs between industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: character entering narrow alley and climbing stairs between tall buildings with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with red paint and large white graffiti art
steep flight of concrete stairs leading upward between buildings
traditional white paper lanterns hanging overhead in the alley
large industrial electrical equipment with warning labels

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow enclosed alleyway with red graffiti-covered walls and industrial utilities. The environment shifts to low lighting as the character ascends a steep concrete staircase lined with traditional paper lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with city views

events.description: exits stairwell onto open rooftop walkway with panoramic city views
begins descending stairs on opposite side of rooftop

agents.ego_description: character traversing elevated walkway, passing seated NPCs at rooftop tables before descending

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting at red plastic table on rooftop terrace

entered.detail: open concrete walkway with metal railings overlooking the city
distant view of futuristic skyscrapers and industrial structures
elevated walkway structure connecting buildings across the street
small food vendor setup with illuminated menu displays

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell onto an exposed rooftop walkway, the scene opens to bright sunlight and distant city skyline views. The character passes a seated NPC at a rooftop food stall before beginning the descent back to street level via another staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with outdoor dining

events.description: descends stairs into open plaza with outdoor seating and commercial buildings
turns left to follow the sloping commercial street

agents.ego_description: character walking through bustling commercial plaza past outdoor cafes and shops

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs sitting at outdoor cafe tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: blue and black commercial building with prominent 'KIROSHI' neon signage
green circular sign with 'KABUKI' text marking the market entrance
red and green plastic tables and chairs on the sidewalk
string of red traditional lanterns hanging across the street

segments.scene_description: Descending into a sunlit commercial plaza, the character enters a vibrant area with the Kiroshi building and Kabuki market sign visible. Red paper lanterns hang overhead as NPCs sit at outdoor cafe tables, creating a lively atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with vehicle traffic and intersections

events.description: black van drives past on the left side of the street
character crosses intersection with zebra stripes while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: character navigating main street, crossing intersections and avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: black van driving down the street past the character
worker in red outfit pushing cart along sidewalk

entered.detail: tall red and teal buildings with multiple balconies and signage
large concrete overpass with vehicles visible on upper level
futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades visible in the distance
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a main commercial street with asphalt paving and active vehicle traffic. After a black van passes by, the character crosses a zebra-striped intersection with elevated highways and distant corporate towers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with descending stairs

events.description: turns right into narrow alleyway between tall buildings
begins descending steep stairs into lower alley section

agents.ego_description: character navigating narrow passage and descending stairs between close building walls

entered.detail: tight passage between buildings with trash bags and debris
steep concrete staircase leading downward into darker area
building exterior painted teal with large windows
tall narrow illuminated signs with Asian characters

segments.scene_description: The final segment sees the character turning into a narrow back alley between tall buildings, leaving the busy street behind. The character descends a steep staircase into a darker, more enclosed space with teal building walls and vertical neon signs visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban district, transitioning from bright commercial streets into enclosed industrial spaces and back again. It begins in a partially covered market that opens into a sunlit street lined with neon billboards and passing white cars, before turning into a narrow, graffiti-covered alleyway. As the character ascends a steep staircase lined with paper lanterns, the scene expands onto an exposed rooftop walkway with views of the distant skyline, then descends back into a vibrant commercial plaza featuring the Kiroshi building and outdoor cafes. The camera then moves onto a main asphalt road with active vehicle traffic and elevated highways before finally turning away from the bustle into a dark, narrow back alley with teal walls and distant vertical neon signs.
